covers: drag-wins (MARK-04) — dragging a marker-carrying card INTO in_review consumes the marker: the still-visible marker is deduped against the persisted lastMarker so the card never bounces back out
marker-free-clear (IN-06) — once the consumed marker scrolls off, in_review is out-of-attention so the stale dedup key clears only after TWO consecutive marker-free ticks
